summary:
Netlify build-config iteration 5 validation. Verified /app/netlify.toml has base='frontend', publish='build' (resolves to frontend/build inside base), command='yarn install && yarn build', full env vars (NODE_VERSION=20, CI=false, DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true, ESLINT_NO_DEV_ERRORS=true, TSC_COMPILE_ON_ERROR=true, NPM_FLAGS=--legacy-peer-deps, GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false, NETLIFY_USE_YARN=true), and SPA fallback redirect [[redirects]] /* -> /index.html 200. /app/frontend/.nvmrc exists with '20'. Ran local production build (CI=false DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false yarn build) — exit 0, 'Done in 12.77s.' 'Compiled successfully.' 'Cannot find ESLint plugin (ESLintWebpackPlugin).' confirming ESLint plugin is disabled as expected. Build output verified: index.html (5657B) contains
, references Typekit stylesheet (use.typekit.net/kiu8ndx.css) and emergent-main.js script; /app/frontend/build/_redirects contains '/* /index.html 200'; static/js/main.b11346b7.js and static/css/main.df365bfd.css present. Local SPA-serve smoke test via `npx serve -s build -l 5055` — all 7 routes (/, /work, /work/manufacturing-performance, /about, /writing, /writing/inside-out, /connect) returned HTTP 200 with identical 5657-byte index.html payload (root div + Typekit + emergent script). Playwright deep-link render on local serve: data-testid='work-detail-manufacturing-performance' and data-testid='writing-detail-inside-out' both visible, 0 console errors. Regression on preview URL https://method-positioning.preview.emergentagent.com — home hero renders, /work shows 2 work cards, /writing shows 8 posts, 0 console errors.

netlify_config_review.publish_path_fix: PASS — publish='build' is relative to base='frontend' so effective publish dir is frontend/build (the actual output). Previous iteration_4 had publish='frontend/build' which incorrectly resolved to frontend/frontend/build causing Netlify exit code 2.
netlify_config_review.eslint_hardening: PASS — DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true confirmed active (build log shows 'Cannot find ESLint plugin (ESLintWebpackPlugin)').
netlify_config_review.spa_redirect: PASS — [[redirects]] rule present and public/_redirects also copied into build for defense-in-depth.
netlify_config_review.yarn_command: PASS — 'yarn install && yarn build' (no --frozen-lockfile, allowing lockfile regen if Netlify env yields tiny diffs).
netlify_config_review.notes: Cannot actually trigger Netlify build from this environment; only static validation + local reproduction of build+serve is possible. Config file schema is valid TOML.

critical_code_review_comments: netlify.toml NPM_FLAGS='--legacy-peer-deps' is only used if a tool falls back to npm; harmless with yarn but consider removing if strict yarn workflow is desired.
Consider adding SECRETS_SCAN_OMIT_KEYS if any REACT_APP_* env is later added to avoid Netlify secret-scan false-positives (not a current issue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Netlify config iteration 5 is validated locally end-to-end: production build succeeds, all SPA deep-links serve index.html, deep-link testids render, preview URL regression clean. Actual Netlify deploy still needs user to push to GitHub for real-world validation — cannot verify from this container. If a future iteration must debug a Netlify build again, remember: `publish` is RELATIVE to `base`; keep publish='build' when base='frontend'.
rca of the issue: Netlify iteration_4 failed with exit code 2 because publish='frontend/build' was interpreted RELATIVE to base='frontend', resolving to frontend/frontend/build (nonexistent). Iteration 5 fixes this by setting publish='build' (=> frontend/build). Additional hardening: ESLint disabled via env flags to avoid Netlify's stricter Node env treating warnings as errors, and node version pinned via .nvmrc + NODE_VERSION for reproducibility.
